title: distephana citrifolia
intro: Distephana citrifolia is a plant species commonly known as the 'Tropical Orange Blossom Tree' or 'Sweet Orange', known for its fragrant flowers and edible fruits. The medicinal properties of the plant are attributed to its leaves, which contain flavonoids, limonoids, and essential oils, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Distephana citrifolia include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from colds and flu due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used for medicinal purposes, as well as its essential oil, used in aromatherapy and perfumery.
